title: trisetum canescens var. montanum
intro: Trisetum canescens var. montanum, also known as Mountain Hairgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mountain Hairgrass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
